title: Keaton's Reimagined Bookshelves
description: What the bookshelf was meant to be!
body:
This pack comes with only one texture, but 4 styles to choose from. In the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/keatons-reimagined-bookshelf/gallery) it says how to replace the default style with a different one.

![All 4 bookshelf variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3092e34f50e71a9aec6a1b2b0282a2b57d5875e.gif)

***

***Disclaimer:** This pack only adds one bookshelf texture—it does not add all 4 variants at once.
